[[If You Remove It Does It Change]], [[Spot Edit Principle]], [[Show Don't Tell]], [[Scene Value]], [[Causal Chain Audit]], [[Single Version Principle]], [[Binary Question]], [[Cut Priority Method]].

2026-06-24 (21:34): **Ingest — Dramatic Gobo Lighting**. Created [[Gobo投影光影]] concept page. Key insight: 64 Gobo texture images for product lighting.

2026-06-24 (21:34): **Ingest — Hermes Agent skill self-management**. Created [[AI技能自管理]] concept page. Three mechanisms: auto skill creation, usage tracking, lifecycle management.

2026-06-24 (19:56): **Ingest — AI 图像生成提示词 28 案例**. Created [[sources/OpenAI-GPT-4o-Image-Generation-28案例]] and 8 concept pages: [[变量与不变量分离]], [[产物先行]], [[小步迭代]], [[提示词模板八要素]], [[角色锚定]], [[摄影语言锚定质感]], [[编辑三要素]], [[反向约束]]. Total wiki pages: 51 → 60.

2026-06-23 (23:10): **Ingest — 5 Agent Skill Design Patterns**. Created [[Agent Skill Design Patterns]] concept page. Key insight: progressive disclosure is foundational; patterns are composable. Total wiki pages: 48 → 50.

2026-06-23 (21:30): **Concept extraction — 5 Image Generation principles from HKH project**. Created [[描述比重原则]], [[视觉描述优先原则]], [[参考图优先原则]], [[克制原则]], [[一致性锚点原则]]. Total wiki pages: 30 → 35.

2026-06-23 (14:19): **Batch ingest — Local LLM Deployment ecosystem**. Created 6 concept pages ([[Ollama]], [[Local LLM Deployment]], etc.), 5 entity pages, 6 source pages. Total wiki pages: 19 → 30.
